'''vawobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidocyst|cnidocyst]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidocyst|cnidocyst]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vawobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væwebeth|væwebeth]] || [[word:væwebej|væwebej]] || [[word:væwebesh|væwebesh]] || [[word:væwebe|væwebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vawowoboth|vawowoboth]] || [[word:vawowoboj|vawowoboj]] || [[word:vawowobosh|vawowobosh]] || [[word:vawowobo|vawowobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vawoboth|vawoboth]] || [[word:vawoboj|vawoboj]] || [[word:vawobosh|vawobosh]] || [[word:vawobo|vawobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vawofboth|vawofboth]] || [[word:vawofboj|vawofboj]] || [[word:vawofbosh|vawofbosh]] || [[word:vawofbof|vawofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vawobotho|vawobotho]] || [[word:vawobojo|vawobojo]] || [[word:vawobosho|vawobosho]] || [[word:vawoboko|vawoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vawoboth|vawoboth]] || [[word:vawoboj|vawoboj]] || [[word:vawobosh|vawobosh]] || [[word:vawobo|vawobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vawobothol|vawobothol]] || [[word:vawobojol|vawobojol]] || [[word:vawoboshol|vawoboshol]] || [[word:vawobokol|vawobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vawobothotho|vawobothotho]] || [[word:vawobojojo|vawobojojo]] || [[word:vawoboshosho|vawoboshosho]] || [[word:vawoboko|vawoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vawobothon|vawobothon]] || [[word:vawobojon|vawobojon]] || [[word:vawoboshon|vawoboshon]] || [[word:vawobokon|vawobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vawobothoro|vawobothoro]] || [[word:vawobojoro|vawobojoro]] || [[word:vawoboshoro|vawoboshoro]] || [[word:vawobokoro|vawobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
